X Banner Stand Features & Display Specifications

Professional adjustable X banner stand hardware designed for trade show displays, retail environments, and promotional events. This durable display system accommodates multiple banner sizes with flexible fiberglass arms that keep banners taut and wrinkle-free.

Key Features

  • High-impact plastic support hub and banner hooks for reliable performance
  • Strong, flexible fiberglass arms maintain banner tension
  • Adjustable arms accommodate multiple banner sizes from small to large
  • Lightweight 2lb construction for easy transport and setup
  • Compatible with various banner materials and thicknesses

Display Specifications

  • Product Size: 36" W x 78" H x 27.5" D when fully extended
  • Weight: 2 pounds for portable display setup
  • Setup Time: Less than 2 minutes assembly
  • Banner sold separately - hardware only

Important: To avoid damaging the frame, do not use banners below the recommended size specifications.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

X Banner Stand Material & Construction Details

Built with premium materials for long-lasting trade show and promotional display performance.

Frame Construction

  • Fiberglass Arms: Flexible yet strong fiberglass construction provides optimal banner tension without breaking or bending under normal use
  • Plastic Hub System: High-impact plastic support hub engineered to withstand repeated assembly and disassembly
  • Banner Hooks: Durable plastic hooks designed to securely hold banner grommets without tearing or slipping

Durability Features

  • Weather-resistant materials suitable for indoor and covered outdoor use
  • Impact-resistant construction handles transport and setup stress
  • Lightweight design reduces shipping costs and setup effort
  • Adjustable tension system accommodates various banner weights

Compatible Banner Materials

  • Vinyl banners with grommets
  • Fabric banners with reinforced edges
  • Mesh banners for windy conditions
  • Canvas and other heavy-duty banner materials
PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

X Banner Stand Setup & Configuration Options

Multiple setup configurations available to accommodate different display requirements and banner sizes.

Size Adjustments

  • Minimum Banner Size: 24" x 48" recommended for proper tension
  • Maximum Banner Size: 36" x 78" full extension capacity
  • Custom Sizing: Adjustable arms accommodate intermediate sizes between minimum and maximum

Display Configurations

  • Portrait Orientation: Standard vertical banner display for maximum visibility
  • Landscape Setup: Horizontal banner mounting for wide format messages
  • Tension Adjustment: Variable arm extension for optimal banner tautness

Assembly Options

  • No tools required for standard assembly
  • Color-coded connection points for easy setup
  • Snap-together design for quick deployment
  • Compact storage when disassembled

Stability Features

  • Wide base configuration for enhanced stability
  • Low center of gravity design reduces tipping
  • Optional weighted base compatibility (sold separately)

X Banner Stand Hardware Production & Shipping Times

Choose from flexible production timeframes to meet your display deadline requirements.

2 Business Days Express

Fast turnaround for urgent trade show and event display needs.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST processed next business day
  • Emergency same-day options available - contact customer service
  • Total delivery time includes production plus shipping time
  • Turnaround begins when order is complete and payment processed

3 Business Days Standard

Most popular option balancing speed and cost for X banner stand orders.

  • Free standard production timeframe
  • Ideal for planned promotional campaigns and events
  • Orders after 5:00 PM CST start processing next business day
  • Includes quality control inspection before shipping

5 Business Days Saver

Cost-effective option when advance planning allows extended production time.

  • Reduced pricing for non-urgent display hardware orders
  • Same quality standards as faster production options
  • Perfect for bulk orders and advance event planning
  • Additional time allows for thorough quality testing

Note: Production time starts when all specifications are confirmed and payment is processed. Proof approval delays will extend delivery timeline accordingly.

Shipping Options for X Banner Stand Hardware Delivery

Multiple shipping methods available to meet your display timeline requirements. All X banner stand hardware ships from our Minnesota facility.

Domestic Shipping Options

  • Standard Shipping: 3-5 business days delivery
  • Three Day: 3 business days guaranteed delivery
  • Two Day: 2 business days expedited shipping
  • Overnight: Next business day delivery
  • Freight: Large quantity orders and oversized packages

Shipping Cost Factors

  • Package weight and dimensions determine base shipping cost
  • Destination zip code affects final shipping price
  • Large orders may require additional shipping charges
  • Oversized packages subject to dimensional weight pricing

International Shipping

  • International delivery available with customer-provided labels
  • USPS and UPS international labels accepted
  • Customer must provide customs documentation
  • Contact customer service for international shipping quotes

Economy Shipping Notes

  • Include P.O. Box information in "Address Two" field when applicable
  • Economy shipping adds 5-10 additional delivery days
  • Delivery timeframe varies by destination location
  • Not recommended for time-sensitive display events

Shipping Origin: All X banner stand hardware manufactured and shipped from Minnesota facility only.

Versatile display solution for professional presentations, promotional events, and business marketing applications.

Trade Show Applications

  • Booth Displays: Prominent banner display at trade show booths and exhibitions
  • Product Promotions: Feature new products and services with eye-catching banners
  • Company Branding: Display corporate logos and messaging for brand recognition
  • Directional Signage: Guide attendees to specific booth locations or areas

Retail & Business Uses

  • Store Promotions: Highlight sales, new arrivals, and special offers
  • Grand Openings: Welcome customers and announce new business locations
  • Seasonal Displays: Change banners easily for holiday and seasonal promotions
  • Event Marketing: Promote special events, workshops, and customer appreciation days

Event & Conference Applications

  • Registration Areas: Clear signage for check-in and information stations
  • Sponsor Recognition: Display sponsor logos and acknowledgments prominently
  • Session Identification: Mark breakout rooms and presentation areas
  • Welcome Displays: Greet attendees with professional branded messaging

Portable Display Benefits

  • Quick 2-minute setup for time-sensitive events
  • Lightweight transport between venues and locations
  • Reusable hardware for multiple banner campaigns
  • Cost-effective alternative to permanent display fixtures

X Banner Stand Hardware Specifications & Requirements

Technical specifications and setup requirements for optimal X banner stand performance and banner compatibility.

Banner Requirements

  • Minimum Size: 24" x 48" to ensure proper tension and stability
  • Maximum Size: 36" x 78" full extension capacity
  • Grommet Placement: Grommets required at all four corners for secure attachment
  • Recommended Materials: 13oz vinyl, fabric, or mesh banner materials

Setup Specifications

  • Assembly Time: Less than 2 minutes with no tools required
  • Floor Space: 36" x 27.5" footprint when fully extended
  • Height Clearance: 78" maximum height requires adequate ceiling clearance
  • Weight Capacity: Supports banners up to 5 pounds safely

Compatible Banner Features

  • Reinforced edges prevent tearing during tension adjustment
  • Heavy-duty grommets (#2 or larger) for secure hook attachment
  • Fade-resistant inks for long-term display applications
  • Wind-resistant materials for covered outdoor use

Storage & Transport

  • Disassembled Size: Compact storage in carrying case or box
  • Weight: 2 pounds total for easy transport
  • Carrying Case: Optional protective case available separately
  • Multiple Units: Stack efficiently for bulk transport to events

Important: Banner sold separately. Hardware only includes X-frame, support hub, and attachment hooks.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

X Banner Stand Hardware FAQ

What banner sizes work with this X banner stand hardware?

The adjustable X banner stand accommodates banners from 24" x 48" minimum up to 36" x 78" maximum. Using banners smaller than the recommended minimum size may damage the frame due to over-extension of the fiberglass arms.

Are banners included with the X banner stand hardware?

No, this listing is for hardware only. Banners are sold separately and can be ordered through our custom banner section. The hardware works with any properly sized banner that has grommets in all four corners.

How much does the X banner stand weigh for transport?

The complete X banner stand hardware weighs only 2 pounds, making it extremely portable for trade shows, events, and multi-location displays. The lightweight fiberglass construction reduces shipping costs and setup effort.

Can this X banner stand be used outdoors?

The X banner stand is designed for indoor use and covered outdoor applications. For fully outdoor use, we recommend weighted bases (sold separately) and wind-resistant banner materials like mesh to prevent tipping in windy conditions.

How long does it take to set up the X banner stand?

Assembly takes less than 2 minutes with no tools required. The color-coded snap-together design allows for quick deployment at trade shows and events, plus compact storage when disassembled.

What production time should I choose for my event?

For upcoming events, choose 2-day express production. For planned campaigns, 3-day standard offers the best value. If you're ordering well in advance, 5-day saver provides cost savings. Remember that production time starts when your order is complete and payment is processed.

Can I order multiple X banner stands for bulk pricing?

Yes, volume discounts are available for multiple unit orders. Contact our customer service team for bulk pricing quotes and business account setup with net payment terms for qualified commercial customers.
